name: dev.ucp.shopping.additional_fields_text_validation
title: Text Validation Additional Fields Extension
description: Extends Additional Fields with text validation hints for checkout text additional fields.

text_validation_input.title: Text Validation Input
text_validation_input.description: Text field semantics with optional validation hints. The base multiline hint remains defined by the base Additional Fields extension.

min_length.description: Minimum number of characters accepted by the business.

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters accepted by the business.

pattern.description: Regular expression the submitted value should match.

dev.ucp.shopping.additional_fields.title: Additional Fields with Text Validation
dev.ucp.shopping.additional_fields.description: Additional Fields extended with text validation hints.

additional_fields.description: Merchant-defined additional checkout fields with text validation hints.

type.description: Field type identifier. This extension adds validation hints to the base text type.

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Text Validation Additional Fields
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout additional fields extended with text validation hints.

additional_fields.description: Merchant-defined additional checkout fields with text validation hints.
